The Cube

Duke's premier organization for student entrepreneurs

Join Spring Rush

Our mission

The Cube lowers the barriers to entrepreneurship at Duke by giving students the skills, resources, and community to build ventures of all kinds. Our alumni have launched multimillion-dollar companies and been featured by Forbes, CNN, and more.

What we've built

Cube alumni have built companies across industries, raising more than $169M in funding along the way. This is a snapshot of what our community has gone on to build.

Ventures at Duke

pEdge
DPAD
pEdge

Support from first sketch to shipped product

We are a community of computer scientists, engineers, economists, business developers, and more. We provide comprehensive entrepreneurial support all the way from evaluating product-market fit to technical development.

We work closely with Duke's entrepreneurship faculty to get our members the resources and expertise necessary to succeed. Our community is active in programs like the Duke Start-up Challenge and Melissa & Doug Entrepreneurship program.

Speaking events

Public and private talks with founders, investors, and operators.

Entrepreneurship summits

Gatherings that bring the Duke startup community together.

Professional development workshops

Hands-on sessions to build the skills ventures actually need.

Our Experiences

We're proud to have contributed at the following companies, from multi-billion dollar public firms to private startups.
